title: Manual Battle Mode

movement.title: Choose Movement
movement.mapSelect: Select a tile on the map to move

defeatEscape.title: Imminent Defeat!
defeatEscape.message: You are about to lose. Will you attempt to escape?
defeatEscape.sealEscape: Use Command Seal (Guaranteed Escape) — Stat Penalty
defeatEscape.refusedMessage: {{name}} refuses to retreat and keeps fighting! (Master Trust: Low)

playerEscaped.title: Escape Successful!
playerEscaped.sealMessage: Used a Command Seal to successfully escape!

forcedBridge.title: Forced Assembly!
forcedBridge.message: From Day 7 onwards, all Servants are forcibly summoned to Fuyuki Bridge. Escape is impossible.
forcedBridge.gather: The Holy Grail's power concentrates on Fuyuki Bridge... All Heroic Spirits are summoned to the final battlefield.

enemyEscaped.title: Enemy Escaped!
enemyEscaped.sealMessage: {{name}} used a Command Seal to successfully escape!

counterSeal.title: Enemy Master's Command Seal!
counterSeal.message: The enemy Master is about to use a Command Seal... Will you counter with yours?

area.leyline: Ley Line — Caster Territory Creation bonus

log.antiMagic: {{name}}'s Magic Resistance blocked the magic attack
log.specialAttack: True Name Release — {{np}}! Special attack against {{target}}!
log.sealEscape: {{name}} used a Command Seal to escape!
log.madDisobey: {{name}}'s Mad Enhancement activates! Acts as {{overriddenIntent}} instead of {{originalIntent}}
log.madDisobeyClass: {{class}}'s Mad Enhancement activates! Acts as {{overriddenIntent}} instead of {{originalIntent}}
log.aiCombatDistant: Magical disturbance detected in the distance...
log.independentAction: {{name}} persists through Independent Action for {{days}} days
log.gameOver: Holy Grail War concluded — {{winner}} is victorious

sealBoost: {{name}}'s Master used a Command Seal to boost combat power!
npFullPower: {{name}}'s Master deployed Noble Phantasm '{{np}}' with a Command Seal!
startTRPGDesc: Make strategic choices and join the Holy Grail War directly

tips.title: Battle Guide
tips.npDeploy: NP Deploy: Uses Command Seal, combat bonus based on NP rank (C=+10%, A=+17.5%, EX=+20%)
tips.specialAttack: Special Attack: Auto-triggers based on enemy traits (win rate +7.5~22.5%)
tips.escape: Escape: Based on AGI/LCK difference, Riding/Presence Concealment bonus (base 50%)
tips.noEscapeDay7: Day 7+: No escape allowed, all servants gather at Fuyuki Bridge
tips.ambush: Assassin Ambush: When hunting, ambush chance based on Presence Concealment (+20% if success)
tips.antiMagic: Magic Resistance: Saber/Lancer/Archer get bonus vs Caster
tips.territory: Territory Creation: Combat bonus after 2+ turns on same tile

manaSupply.title: Mana Supply
manaSupply.promptWithName: {{name}} seems to trust the Master... Supply mana?
manaSupply.promptWeakness: {{name}} seems greatly weakened by defeat. Attempt to improve their condition with mana supply?

loop.battleWinTrust: Victory! {{name}} trusts the Master even more deeply now.
loop.actionPositive: {{name}} seems pleased with the Master's decision.
loop.actionNegative: {{name}} doesn't seem to approve of the Master's choice.
loop.actionNeutral: {{name}} follows the Master's order without a word.
loop.escapeRelief: {{name}} seems relieved by the Master's judgment.
loop.crisisEscapeRelief: Crisis averted. {{name}} seems relieved by the Master's judgment.
loop.escapeRefused: {{name}} refuses to retreat and continues fighting! (Master trust: Low)
loop.penaltyStatus1: {{name}} is suffering from the aftermath of defeat.
loop.penaltyStatus2: {{name}} is still recovering from Spirit Origin damage.
loop.penaltyStatus3: {{name}}'s mana flow is unstable. The Spirit Core may be cracked.

affStatus.hostile1: {{name}} is hostile toward the Master. Caution is advised.
affStatus.hostile2: The wariness in {{name}}'s eyes refuses to fade.
affStatus.wary2: {{name}} is keeping a distance from the Master.
affStatus.neutral1: {{name}} maintains a normal relationship with the Master.
affStatus.trusting2: {{name}} acts steadily at the Master's side.
affStatus.intimate1: {{name}} has formed a deep bond with the Master.
affStatus.devoted1: {{name}} has resolved to do anything for the Master.

loop.manaPositive: {{name}} seems satisfied with the mana transfer.
loop.manaNegative: {{name}} doesn't seem pleased with this mana transfer.
loop.sealForceControl: The Command Seal forcibly restrains {{name}}. But {{name}}'s gaze has grown colder.

narrative.quietNight: A quiet night settles over Fuyuki City.
narrative.npSealUse: {{name}} unleashes Noble Phantasm '{{np}}' with a Command Seal!
narrative.sealBoost: {{name}}'s Master uses a Command Seal! Combat power increases!
narrative.enemySealEscape: {{name}}'s Master uses a Command Seal! Forced transfer — {{name}} withdraws from the battlefield!
narrative.betrayalDefeat1: Betrayed by {{name}}. Leaving you bleeding on the ground, {{name}} vanishes into the night.
narrative.betrayalDefeat2: {{name}}'s blade pierces the Master. The contract is broken. {{name}} turns away without a word.
narrative.betrayalDefeat3: {{name}} tears away even the Master's Command Seals and leaves the battlefield. Only the cold night wind passes over your fallen body.
narrative.spiritCoreDestroyed: {{name}}'s Spirit Core has been destroyed. Withdrawal is commencing...
narrative.betrayalKillingIntent: {{name}}'s killing intent is directed at the Master.
narrative.betrayalRefusal: {{name}} no longer intends to obey the Master's commands.

betrayal.title: Your Servant is attempting betrayal!
betrayal.useSeal: Restrain Servant with Command Seal (1 seal)
